TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Nickola_Shreli, title = Nickola_Shreli, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Nickola_Shreli} }

S.FORM: Nickola Shreli kawas tay, ryax sa tay 30 nqu tay 7, Nickola Shreli, squliq na Bunge'. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
Nickola Shreli kawas tay, ryax sa tay 30 nqu tay 7, Nickola Shreli, squliq na Bunge'. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
S.PHON: niʦ~ʨkola s~ɕħreli kawas~ɕ taj, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, niʦ~ʨkola s~ɕħreli, s~ɕquliq na βuŋeʔ. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* aʦ~ʨtors~ɕ
